description: The player lost 2 HP while moving along the tracks.
A hidden tripwire disguised by snow caught the player's ankle, triggering a net of icy vines that dropped from above, ensnaring the player and delivering a bludgeoning blow to the shoulder.
Two figures emerge from the forest shadows carrying spears, identify the player as a captive, and the player ceases struggling against the icy vines.
Two figures tighten a net around the player, bind their wrists and ankles with coarse rope, and hoist them to their feet to be led deeper into the forest.
The player and their captors arrive at a camp featuring lean-tos and a bonfire, surrounded by figures in furs.
The player is led into a rough encampment where they are confronted by a commanding elder figure who gazes sharply at them.
The elder closely inspected the player's elven features and warlock attire.
The elder probed the bindings on the player's wrists and inspected their warlock attire and elven features.
The elder retrieved dark fibrous material from a bowl and held it out to the player.
The player attempts to grasp the dark fibrous material held by the elder but struggles due to stiff fingers and bindings, resulting in only brushing against the damp, sticky substance.
The elder gestures to a captor who loosens the ropes binding the player's wrists and ankles, though the player remains entangled in the net.
The net around the player no longer restricts their movement, granting them freedom to act.
The player applied the material to their forehead, following the elder's previous instruction.
The player applies dark fibrous material to their forehead, and a woman offers a bowl of clear, steaming broth.
A former captor untangles the icy vines of the net, freeing the player completely.
The player drank the broth, restoring 2 HP.
